message:
fix(analytics): Track B sort_value read as f64 for cost metric breakdown

When EstimatedCostUsd metric is used, SUM(estimated_cost_usd) returns a
Real (f64) from SQLite, but the row reader expected i64. Now reads as
f64 first and casts to i64, falling back to i64 read for integer columns.

Adds regression tests for agent + model cost breakdowns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
